title: Mark Lee (rugby league)
description: Wales international rugby league footballer and coach
extract: Mark Lee (born 27 March 1968) is a former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1980s, 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for Blackbrook ARLFC (in St Helens, Merseyside), St. Helens and Salford City Reds as a scrum-half, hooker, or second-row, and coached at club level for Blackpool Panthers and Blackbrook ARLFC.
